title: aegialina tenuis
intro: Aegialina tenuis, also known as Lycium ruthenicum, is a flowering plant species native to Eastern Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aegialina tenuis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Aegialina tenuis are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and to alleviate various health issues.
